---
title: "Using OSF to Share Data: A Step-by-Step Guide"
pagetitle: "Using OSF to Share Data: A Step-by-Step Guide"
date: "2026-04-05"
date-title: "Date Added"
author: "James Borders"
author-title: "Contributor"
short-description: "This paper serves as a tutorial for using OSF to meet the needs for sharing psychological data."
resource-link: "https://www.tesl-ej.org/OSF-HowTo.pdf"
categories:
 - For Scientists
 - Free
 - Guide
 - Open Data
editor: source
---

----
## About this Resource
{{< meta short-description >}}
\

[Visit Resource]({{< meta resource-link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}
